name: Aakashvani v2 — Hindi Podcast Generator
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y ffmpeg && pip install --no-cache-dir edge-tts pydub gtts numpy && bash scripts/setup_music.sh
postStartCommand: [ -d .venv ] && .venv/bin/pip install -q edge-tts pydub gtts numpy 2>/dev/null; true
